text: He was both my safe place and my wild storm.
Some infinities are bigger than other infinities.
We accept the love we think we deserve.
book: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

text: It was you. It was always going to be you.
and I wish I didn't know her lipgloss tasted like cherries. Suddenly I've got a killer sweet tooth
A dragon without its rider is a tragedy. A rider without their dragon is dead
you're like a rose in a graveyard. I wonder what you could have turned into without the war
Happy Birthday, little muse. Remember, a future where you don't belong to me doesn't exist.

I don't know if God really exists. I don't know if mankind has ever walked on the moon. But what I do know is that I just found the meaning of life sitting behind a table with an awkward smile on her face
to the world she's formidable. To me, she's the world
you asked me what my favourite color was once. I'd never even pondered the answer to that question before you. And yet, I realised in that moment that it was blue. It is your eyes.
